content.claim: SNI growth is concentrated in 'severe learning/attention/behavioral-regulation disorder' (66% of SNI students), not classic disability categories; 12% have autism spectrum disorder. Gender disparity: ~10% of boys nationally vs. 6.1% of girls classified as SNI.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Legal and governance lens
limitations: Definition of 'severe learning/attention/behavioral-regulation disorder' may vary across expert committees
No comparison of diagnostic criteria or threshold changes over the 20-year period
Gender and regional disparities documented but causal explanations not provided
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
